title: Loukios #3066
definition:
Lucius = "light: bright: white"

 1) a man from Cyrene who was a prophet and a teacher of the church in
    Antioch (\\#Ac 13:1\\), perhaps the same one as mentioned in \\#Ro 16:21\\
